task_pressure: The agent needed to separate a current repair tactic from durable system doctrine.
actual_trajectory: Current working-process language was treated as if it should become a stable system rule before the owner boundary was settled.
first_failure: A temporary workflow correction was promoted into durable guidance language without proving it belonged there.
consequence: Future agents could inherit accidental process entropy as a route rule and overfit the system to one active repair episode.
privacy_boundary: Only bounded event refs and normalized route descriptions are recorded; raw correction text stays in .aoa.
existing_surface_check: Adjacent central fit is aoa-trace-outcome-separation and aoa-tool-trajectory-discipline; the packet does not assert proof coverage.
candidate_state_reason: The failure family is clear, but deciding durable doctrine versus repair tactic requires owner review.
promotion_forbidden_until: manual source-span review completed by owner
candidate converted into skill trigger or central eval design by owner
next_step: Decide whether this should become an aoa-skills trigger case, an aoa-evals route-trajectory eval, or a rejected one-off repair note.
